patch.value:
# Semgrep downloaded findings triage batch

Source CSV: /home/steve/Downloads/Semgrep_Code_Combined_Findings_2026_07_06.csv
Downloaded: 2026-07-06
Finding count: 40
Repository: unbraind/pm-cli

This parent groups the Semgrep Code findings imported from the downloaded CSV so each platform finding has a durable pm issue with source links and triage metadata.

Duplicate check before import: `pm search semgrep --status all --limit 100 --json` returned 0 items, and `rg` found no Semgrep finding IDs or semgrep.dev finding links under `.agents/pm`.
Semgrep 2026-07-06 downloaded code findings triage batch
Import and triage the 40 Semgrep Code findings downloaded on 2026-07-06, preserving each platform finding as a linked pm issue with source links and security metadata.
Every Semgrep finding from the CSV has a linked pm Issue with Semgrep ID, rule, severity, status, platform link, code link, autotriage metadata, and rule description.

message: Create Semgrep downloaded findings triage parent

value.author: codex-cli-agent
value.text: Evidence: imported 40 Semgrep Code findings from Semgrep_Code_Combined_Findings_2026_07_06.csv as child Issue items. Duplicate check before import found no existing Semgrep tracker items or Semgrep finding IDs in .agents/pm. Verification after import: pm search semgrep --status all --limit 60 returns 41 items (parent + 40 children); pm list --status all --parent pm-oz8u --limit 60 returns 40 child issues.
